benefits.description: taking it at night does wonders for sleep

side_effects.description: skin irritation similar to welts with 5/16" 31G needle in belly; post-injection pain lasting for hours

protocol_notes: Initially used 5/16" 31G needle subcutaneously in belly; switched to 1/2" 30G needle which resolved skin irritation and reduced post-injection pain. Takes GHK-Cu as part of KLOW blend. Resolved issue: injecting deeper (longer needle) prevents GHK-Cu from seeping into skin layer.
